name: Password reset
description: Terse, security-neutral password reset email with a single reset button and expiry notice.
subject: Reset your {{company_name}} password

variables.name: company_name
variables.description: Sender company or product name; rendered as the header wordmark and in the footer.

variables.name: support_email
variables.description: Support contact email address shown in the footer.

variables.name: company_address
variables.description: Physical mailing address for the footer (CAN-SPAM).

variables.name: preheader
variables.description: Hidden inbox preview text shown next to the subject line.
variables.example: Use this link to choose a new password. It expires soon.

variables.name: action_url
variables.description: The password reset URL behind the button and the fallback link.

variables.name: expires_minutes
variables.description: Minutes until the reset link expires, as a bare number.
